reason: Verify no implementation creates a reverse layer dependency, second workflow authority, or effect bypass.
Verify shared code reflects identical cross-domain semantics rather than superficial similarity.
Verify atomic admission, terminal, Proposal, event, and outbox invariants plus migration safety.
Verify failure, timeout, cancellation, and fail-closed version resolution remain typed and compatible.
Drive full-scope quality checks, negative tests, and failure-injection review.
Verify lint, Import Linter, typing, object-graph, startup, and transaction gates cover known boundary failures.
Verify the final adopt/adapt/drop mapping does not inherit either candidate PR as a merge unit.
Verify every durable Turn Terminal Outcome field has a named consumer and survives topology changes.
Verify the separately staged cancellation product behavior and mixed-version compatibility gates.
Verify manual/robot Step compatibility, confirmation applicability, result progression, and deterministic ELN behavior.
Verify exact legacy/new Behavior Target binding and absence of mutable or branch fallback routing.
